fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases have exact face counts. Native curve-point quaternions now survive Rotate Rotation, Align Rotation to Vector, Instance on Points, and later instance transforms without an Euler round-trip. Vertex counts differ by at most three (0.03%): authored and peak-height cases are +1, edited text is -2, line thickness is +3, and subdivide 12 is +2. A fresh extraction changed only two float32 control-point components and made the one differing Curve to Points position exact, while leaving its maximum rotation error at 1.49e-7 radians; however, those full-precision controls moved the authored downstream weld from +1 to -5 vertices. The current controls are therefore retained until threshold-weld parity is corrected generically. Authored bounds differ by at most 0.0245 units; the five-case maximum is 0.1106 units, down from 0.1197.
